review_title: Great Convenient App At A Great Price!
author: Dominic J.
pros: I love how easy it is to set up each employee.
cons: Editing the projects. But, the team at clock in easy set every project up for us immediately after our request. Now that's great customer service.

author: Jess C.
pros: I like that it is extremely easy to clock in and out of work.
cons: There is nothing specifically I dislike about this service.

review_title: Clock in Easy is just okay
author: missy P.
pros: The price is the best thing about clock in easy.
cons: The software could be so much better in every aspect. GPS is off, customer service is lacking.

review_title: Excellent and Easy Time Tracking Software
description: Overall, reallly like this software. The feature rich software makes time tracking and payroll easy for both our employees and our payroll. The program is easy to use and tweak to our needs, and provides an easily accessible snapshot of our time tracking information. Overall, highly recommend using this software for time tracking.
author: Jonathan G.
pros: This software makes it easy for our employees to clock in and out, without creating unnecessary paper work for our payroll department. This in turn makes their jobs easier and more efficient. A huge benefit for a large organization. There are tons of features and ways to personalize the program.
cons: Occasionally there are instability issues such as crashing in the app. These are rare and do NOT happen often. Definitely not a big deal and is outweighed by the benefits.

description: I am glad that we use clockineasy, its allowed us to spend more time on things that matter. I rely on the program to know which job sites my employees are at without having to bother anyone. Payroll is much more effecient and can be done within 1-2 hours. Highly recommend to any contractor!!
author: Mike M.
pros: I dont know how we ever managed without it. First I was a bit skeptical and reluctant to use a time tracking software.. i thought it would be too much for my guys. I was completely wrong, it saves my office so much time and the hassle of text messages in the morning and afternoon from employees. That was a mess. With clockineasy we have everything in organized right away.. no more texts, excel sheets or emails. I gave my payroll provider a user id and every wednesday its like clock work. I am not sure how much money we saved, we never kept track. I'd being willing to bet it in the thousands annualy certaintly more than the cost of the system.
cons: If you do not archive employees after they leave the company you get charged for them. Even if they didnt use the app during the billing period. It doesnt happen often now I because i stay on top of it now along with my office manager.

description: As the owner of a union company, Clockineasy has been instrumental in accurately tracking hours for our client reports, ensuring transparency and accountability
author: Shimon L.
pros: It made my workplace so much more efficient. Less mistakes. I’m my business even the smallest mistake is costly and clockineasy helped avoid that.
cons: I don’t have any dislikes. The overall process was easy without any complications and it held my workplace to a higher standard .

description: Absolutely love it works amazing for what I use it for
author: Leah B.
pros: How easy it is to keep time of all work for human relations contracts to avoid issues
cons: Wish I could have this much ease with all my apps
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I use this tool to run payroll and daily project management for both our construction companies
description: Overall we are very happy with the platform.. The support team was key in our adoption of the software they made sure on boarding was coordinated and easy.
author: Daria M.
pros: Running weekly payroll for two companies using paper timesheets or excel was a nightmare. Our accountant introduced us to clockineasy and we haven’t looked back since. The crew clocks in once they arrive on site and their timesheets tells me everything I need to know: gps project location, face recognition and to-the-minute time. Most job sites start before I arrive to the office but I can see it all from the mobile app on my way in. At the end of the week I generate a report for the accountant and a job costing report for my boss who can see which projects the guys spent their time on. Heavily recommend to construction/plumbing businesses!
cons: Personnel clocking in at the office didn’t like to clock in with a photo because of the face recognition feature.. but then it became an optional feature so its fine

review_title: We manage employees timesheets with ClockInEasy at both of our hotels
description: Overall a compact system with a lot of neat features, some of them we do not use but its nice to have. The customer support is awesome – their rep is the best!!
author: Donna D.
pros: Simplicity and convenience, the tablets were setup in 10 minutes and employees clocked in from any hotel. Some of our staff rotates so it helped that they only need to remember 1 pin code to clock in. We use face recognition to avoid buddy punching and can leave the tablet unattended, the gps feature isn’t necessary for us but its nice to have. My accountant gets emailed a report every week for both locations and we are all very pleased with how streamlined timesheets and payroll have become. It’s a very compact system with a lot of neat features and it has saved us a lot of headache, time and money. I especially recommended this if you have seasonal/hourly staff.
cons: Vacation/sick day settings could be a bit better, I already mentioned this to customer support.

description: This is the future of clocking in and out, it's cool to be onboard early. It's useful for my company, and my coworkers and I all prefer this method since we started using ClockInEasy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We use this at my company and it is very convenient, I can just use my phone to clock in on their app instead of using an annoying finger print machine that barely works. It's good for checking my own hours too so I always know how much I'm getting paid exactly.
cons: I have not really noticed any con's - it's pretty straight forward.

author: Brianna L.
pros: Easy to set up and use for my team of 10 employees. Holds them accountable for clocking in and out.
cons: I feel that I should be easier to see one persons specific log of all the times they clocked in and out
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Avi B.
pros: Shows my workers someone is watching them
cons: Doesn’t come in in different languages so a worker who doesn’t read or speak English has an extremely hard time using.(or at least tells you he can’t use it) I want to eliminate the excuses

description: Absent some hiccups, it just works. I haven't used it to its full potential I'm sure, but for what I have used it for, it's good.
author: Daniel M.
pros: I signed up based on a recommendation from a labor law attorney friend. It got set up pretty quickly and appears to comply with all DoL requirements.
cons: They require you to have at least two users if you're an owner with one employee, even if the owner is NOT tracking time using the software. Kind of annoying. Also, it's not super easy to figure out what plan you're on at times, and, if a payment is missed, they will lock you out and not let you make payment if you don't have a card on file.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: ESTHER A.
pros: It is easy to use for both employees and administrator.
cons: Would like an easier way to calculate hours for the week for each employee
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: jordan B.
pros: Easy to use payroll software that let's my employees clock in from the jobsite.
cons: One of my employees has never been able to get the software to work on his Android smartphone.

description: As an Independent Pharmacy Owner, I stumbled upon ClockInEasy while seeking a simple and affordable timesheet application. ADP was too expensive and so-called "plug-n-Play" solutions sold in staples or OfficeMax just confusing and can't compare with the simplicity and robust use of this application. A great solution for companies trying to lower their overhead costs and unnecessary adminstrative expenses. I highly recommend this for independent pharmacy owners, healthcare practice managers and other retail companies.
author: Meyer D.
pros: The name says it all. ClockInEasy is very simple to use! It is also more affordable than solutions offered by ADP or any of those "Plug-N-Play" devices sold in staples which are difficult to operate and costly. As Pharmacy Owner, It allowed me to track my courier drivers time-sheet and their geographical location! Definitely saves a lot of time when dealing with 5 or more employees.
cons: If only I knew about ClockInEasy earlier... Before I spent ridiculous amount of money on software and hardware that was expensive and primitive.

description: Our experience has been great and forthcoming. Our rep has been outstanding since the start and even has visited us from time to time but has always kept in contact to assure great customer service and better access to all our questions and concerns. We haven't run into many troubles as the website is consumer easy as well as the app for our employees.
author: Charles S.
pros: This a great application as we have several job sites outside of our main office. It allows us to be sure our employees arrive on time, leave on time and track who hasn't showed up to work. ClockInEasy give us the ability to have easier access to determine our HR needs to give discipline if needed. The reports that can now be provided also aids in our payroll and job costs.
cons: As the employees may not be satisfied, it is company policy, there is nothing least to like about this software from a management position. We can only say, that at times the software may have updates and/or problems where they can't punch or log in. This is rare but has happened on some instances but is to be expected.

author: Gurtej S.
pros: We’ve used a few different methods for time and attendance over the years but ClockInEasy has been the easiest for our employees to use and setup. Our management loves the reporting functionalities which help with job costing. Also the customer service has always been a big help throughout which is greatly appreciated.
cons: If there was an option for my employees to clock out to take lunch that would be nice

review_title: No longer spending hours doing payroll
description: We installed the app on a tablet which everyone uses to clock in and out, every other Wednesday I process a bi-weekly report and email it to my payroll service. Our employees can access all their personal timesheets so it increases transparency and eliminates confusion on payroll amounts
author: Steve R.
pros: With hourly earning employees in the store and on the field, payroll can be a tedious and time consuming task for our business. Collecting accurate time, verifying it and sending to our payroll processor is automated with clockineasy. Its saved us a tremendous amount of time and even money on payroll due to more accurate records.
cons: Initially did not like that face recognition was mandatory for everyone but they changed that and made it optional.

description: The time sheet reports are very useful and easy to use. The customer service is instant too, I can just call my account manager directly with any questions instead of emailing and waiting for a response.
author: BHupinder S.
pros: We use Clockineasy at my warehouse and it's very easy for my employees to clock in and out. This really made payroll painless for me and has saved me 3-4 hours every week
cons: Sometimes employees forget to clock out and I have to manually edit it, but otherwise it has been a smooth process

review_title: Great tool for businesses with multiple locations
description: We installed an ipad at each location and at this point everyone is used to it. I feel more comfortable travelling and spending time away from my stores because I have a clear idea of who is there and when.
author: Rich M.
pros: We initially used the software to spend less time on payroll with the basic clock in / out feature, but it became a huge help when we expanded our pharmacy locations. I can manage daily time and attendance off the app from either store or on the road. My favorite feature is
cons: Havent had too many problems so far, took about a week to implement between the employees and my payroll processor... Customer service did a good job

review_title: Great so far, let's me manage my guys from anywhere
author: Scott Ryan K.
pros: I can easily see when my crew got to their designated jobs from the app, and it helps me with job costing to see how much I'm spending per job. Good thing is I don't even need to call my team, I know that they arrived
cons: I can use some more push notifications to get my attention for important updates if my crew is late or doesn't show

review_title: Made payroll and timekeeping so easy
description: Clockineasy is a great help to our company. I use it on a daily basis and it has saved me a lot of time and continues to do so. Great program!!
author: Daniel P.
pros: It became very hard to manually keep track of our team with calls, texts, and emails and accurate timekeeping/reports was something we required. We've been using Clockineasy for over a year now and its made everything so convenient. Their service is top notch as well, they always respond right away.
cons: It would be nice if they had a constant tracking feature since we provide employees with company phones.

review_title: Excellent for job costing and field insights
description: Really good customer service, very reliable
author: Vadim B.
pros: Our company has personnel on the field and in the warehouse, I like that we can use one system for both. In the warehouse we setup the tablet near the entrance to clock in and out and on the field everyone uses their smartphone. We started stapling copies of the timesheets to client invoice because it shows our guys gps location and face recognition. My clients appreciate the transparency and I think it helps speed payment.
cons: NO direct sync to my payroll processor but we use the csv file and it works.

author: TJ S.
pros: It's so easy for my team to clock in and out from the warehouse. The ClockInEasy staff is very caring and I can see that they value my time the way they answer promptly and effectively.
cons: It would be nice if they had a built in scheduler to organize my employees shifts. No other cons really
